H500.derivation: or (more properly) אֶלְעָלֵה; from H410 (אֵל) and H5927 (עָלָה); God (is) going up;
H500.strongs_def: Elale or Elaleh, a place east of the Jordan

H501.derivation: from H410 (אֵל) and H6213 (עָשָׂה); God has made;
H501.strongs_def: Elasah, the name of four Israelites

H502.derivation: a primitive root, to associate with;
H502.strongs_def: hence, to learn (and causatively to teach)

H504.strongs_def: a family; also (from the sense of yoking or taming) an ox or cow

H505.strongs_def: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand

H506.strongs_def: {hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand}

H508.derivation: from H410 (אֵל) and H6466 (פָּעַל); God (is) act;

H511.derivation: from H410 (אֵל) and H7069 (קָנָה); God has obtained;
H511.strongs_def: Elkanah, the name of several Israelites

H512.derivation: patrial from a name of uncertain derivation;
H512.strongs_def: an Elkoshite or native of Elkosh

H513.derivation: probably from H410 (אֵל) and a masculine form of H8435 (תּוֹלְדָה) (compare H8434 (תּוֹלָד)); God (is) generator;

H514.derivation: or (more properly) אֶלְתְּקֵה; of uncertain derivation;
H514.strongs_def: Eltekeh or Elteke, a place in Palestine

H515.derivation: from H410 (אֵל) and H8626 (תָּקַן); God (is) straight;

H516.strongs_def: 'Thou must not destroy'; probably the opening words to a popular song

H517.strongs_def: a mother (as the bond of the family); in a wide sense (both literally and figuratively (like father))

H518.strongs_def: used very widely as demonstrative, lo!; interrogative, whether?; or conditional, if, although; also Oh that!, when; hence, as a negative, not
H518.kjv_def: (and, can-, doubtless, if, that) (not), [phrase] but, either, [phrase] except, [phrase] more(-over if, than), neither, nevertheless, nor, oh that, or, [phrase] save (only, -ing), seeing, since, sith, [phrase] surely (no more, none, not), though, [phrase] of a truth, [phrase] unless, [phrase] verily, when, whereas, whether, while, [phrase] yet.

H520.strongs_def: properly, a mother (i.e. unit of measure, or the fore-arm (below the elbow), i.e. a cubit; also a door-base (as a bond of the entrance)
H520.kjv_def: cubit, [phrase] hundred (by exchange for H3967 (מֵאָה)), measure, post.

H521.strongs_def: {properly, a mother (i.e. unit of measure, or the fore-arm (below the elbow), i.e. a cubit; also a door-base (as a bond of the entrance)}

H523.strongs_def: a collection, i.e. community of persons

H525.derivation: from H539 (אָמַן), probably in the sense of training; like H542 (אָמָן)

H526.strongs_def: Amon, the name of three Israelites

H528.derivation: of Egyptian derivation; used only as an adjunct of H4996 (נֹא)
H528.strongs_def: Amon (i.e. Ammon or Amn), a deity of Egypt

H530.strongs_def: literally firmness; figuratively security; morally fidelity
H530.kjv_def: faith(-ful, -ly, -ness, (man)), set office, stability, steady, truly, truth, verily.
H530.usage: faithfulness(18x), truth(13x), faithfully(5x), office(5x), faithful(3x), faith(1x), stability(1x), steady(1x), truly(1x), verily(1x)

H534.derivation: apparently from H559 (אָמַר) (in the sense of self-exaltation);
H534.strongs_def: a summit (of a tree or mountain

H535.strongs_def: to droop; by implication to be sick, to mourn

H539.derivation: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)
H539.strongs_def: properly, to build up or support; to foster as a parent or nurse; figuratively to render (or be) firm or faithful, to trust or believe, to be permanent or quiet; morally to be true or certain;
H539.kjv_def: hence, assurance, believe, bring up, establish, [phrase] fail, be faithful (of long continuance, stedfast, sure, surely, trusty, verified), nurse, (-ing father), (put), trust, turn to the right.
H539.usage: believe(44x), assurance(1x), faithful(20x), sure(11x), established(7x), trust(5x), verified(3x), stedfast(2x), continuance(2x), father(2x), nurse(2x), fail(1x), trusty(1x)

H540.strongs_def: {properly, to build up or support; to foster as a parent or nurse; figuratively to render (or be) firm or faithful, to trust or believe, to be permanent or quiet; morally to be true or certain};

H541.strongs_def: to take the right hand road
H541.kjv_def: turn to the right. See H539 (אָמַן).

H542.derivation: from H539 (אָמַן) (in the sense of training);

H545.derivation: feminine of H544 (אֹמֶן) (in the specific sense of training);

H546.derivation: feminine form of H544 (אֹמֶן) (in its usual sense);

H547.derivation: feminine active participle of H544 (אֹמֶן) (in the original sense of supporting);

H548.strongs_def: something fixed, i.e. a covenant. an allowance

H550.strongs_def: Amnon (or Aminon), a son of David

H551.kjv_def: indeed, no doubt, surely, (it is, of a) true(-ly, -th).

H553.strongs_def: to be alert, physically (on foot) or mentally (in courage)
H553.kjv_def: confirm, be courageous (of good courage, stedfastly minded, strong, stronger), establish, fortify, harden, increase, prevail, strengthen (self), make strong (obstinate, speed).
H553.usage: strengthen(12x), courage(9x), strong(5x), courageous(2x), harden(2x), speed(2x), stronger(2x), confirm(1x), established(1x), fortify(1x), increaseth(1x), obstinate(1x), prevailed(1x)

H554.strongs_def: of a strong color, i.e. red (others fleet)

H558.derivation: or אֲמַצְיָהוּ; from H553 (אָמַץ) and H3050 (יָהּ); strength of Jah;
H558.strongs_def: Amatsjah, the name of four Israelites

H559.kjv_def: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [idiom] expressly, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] intend, name, [idiom] plainly, promise, publish, report, require, say, speak (against, of), [idiom] still, [idiom] suppose, talk, tell, term, [idiom] that is, [idiom] think, use (speech), utter, [idiom] verily, [idiom] yet.
H559.usage: speak(179x), answer(99x), command(30x), tell(29x), call(7x), promised(6x)

H561.kjv_def: answer, [idiom] appointed unto him, saying, speech, word.

H563.derivation: (Aramaic) perhaps from H560 (אֲמַר) (in the sense of bringing forth);

H564.strongs_def: Immer, the name of five Israelites

H565.derivation: or אֶמְרָה; feminine of H561 (אֵמֶר), and meaning the same

H566.strongs_def: Imri, the name of two Israelites

H567.derivation: probably a patronymic from an unused name derived from H559 (אָמַר) in the sense of publicity, i.e. prominence; thus, a mountaineer;
H567.strongs_def: an Emorite, one of the Canaanitish tribes

H568.derivation: or prolonged אֲמַרְיָהוּ; from H559 (אָמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has said (i.e. promised);
H568.strongs_def: Amarjah, the name of nine Israelites

H571.kjv_def: assured(-ly), establishment, faithful, right, sure, true (-ly, -th), verity.
H571.usage: truth(92x), true(18x), truly(7x), right(3x), faithfully(2x), assured(1x), assuredly(1x), establishment(1x), faithful(1x), sure(1x), verity(1x)

H572.strongs_def: properly, something expansive, i.e. a bag

H574.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H4975 (מֹתֶן);

H575.strongs_def: where?; hence, whither?, when?; also hither and thither

H576.derivation: (Aramaic) or אֲנָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H589 (אֲנִי)lemma אֲנַי second vowel, corrected to אֲנִי;

H577.derivation: or אָנָּה; apparent contracted from H160 (אַהֲבָה) and H4994 (נָא);

H579.derivation: a primitive root (perhaps rather identical with H578 (אָנָה) through the idea of contraction in anguish);
H579.strongs_def: to approach; hence, to meet in various senses
H579.kjv_def: befall, deliver, happen, seek a quarrel.

H581.derivation: (Aramaic) or (feminine) אִנִּיןlemma אֵנִּין first vowel, corrected to אִנִּין; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1992 (הֵם);

H582.derivation: from H605 (אָנַשׁ); properly, a mortal (and thus differing from the more dignified H120 (אָדָם)); hence,
H582.strongs_def: a man in general (singly or collectively)
H582.kjv_def: another, [idiom] (blood-) thirsty, certain, chap(-man); divers, fellow, [idiom] in the flower of their age, husband, (certain, mortal) man, people, person, servant, some ([idiom] of them), [phrase] stranger, those, [phrase] their trade. It is often unexpressed in the English versions, especially when used in apposition with another word. Compare H376 (אִישׁ).
H582.usage: man(520x), certain(10x), husbands(3x), some(3x), merchantmen(2x), persons(2x)

H588.derivation: probably from the same root as H5170 (נַחַר); a gorge or narrow pass;

H589.kjv_def: I, (as for) me, mine, myself, we, [idiom] which, [idiom] who.

H590.derivation: probably from H579 (אָנָה) (in the sense of conveyance);

H593.derivation: from H578 (אָנָה) and H5971 (עַם); groaning of (the) people;

H594.derivation: probably from an unused root meaning to be narrow;
H594.strongs_def: according to most a plumb-line, and to others a hook

H599.strongs_def: to breathe hard, i.e. be enraged
